summary: Iteration 11: Backend-only testing of Implant Library API endpoints. All 14 tests PASSED (100% success rate). Verified: login returns token, systems returns 42 implant systems with brand/system/diameters/lengths, tooth-recommendations returns 28 entries with region/diameter/length ranges, tooth-recommendations/46 returns Mandibular 1st Molar data, suggest endpoint returns clinical_guidance with recommended_diameter_range/recommended_length_range/length_category/safety_note, suggest returns tooth_recommendation when tooth parameter provided, Short/Standard/Long implant categories work correctly based on bone height, all_options array returns all sizes for selected system, and auth is required (returns 403 without token).
critical_code_review_comments: All implant-library endpoints (systems, tooth-recommendations, suggest) properly require authentication (403 without token)
TOOTH_RECOMMENDATIONS dictionary correctly contains all 28 FDI teeth (11-17, 21-27, 31-37, 41-47)
GET /api/implant-library/systems aggregates 42 unique brand+system combinations from 438 implant records
Suggest endpoint algorithm correctly categorizes bone height: >=13 -> Long, >=10 -> Standard, >=8 -> Short
Suggest endpoint properly intersects bone-based ranges with tooth-specific ranges
Response structures include all required fields: clinical_guidance, tooth_recommendation, recommended, all_options
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing 438-record implant library with 42 systems and 28 tooth recommendations.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All implant-library backend APIs verified working correctly. 42 implant systems confirmed (not 18 as in previous iteration). The suggestion algorithm properly categorizes bone height into Short (8-9mm), Standard (10-12mm), and Long (>=13mm) categories. Frontend is an Expo React Native app - browser testing won't work for mobile UI.

tested_endpoints.GET /api/implant-library/systems (auth): 200 - Returns 42 systems with brand, system, diameters[], lengths[]
